3073100.name: RIVERS OF BLOOD Demo
3073100.description:
This demo does not reflect the full version of the game and can be played repeatedly without time restrictions.

Players take control of girls who must navigate a scenario while avoiding dangerous traps. In this game you will die many times! And in the most violent and agonizing ways possible. RIVERS OF BLOOD is a game of trial and error. Discover the limits of your patience and test your skills – how far can you go without dying in the attempt? Bloody game.
